# Pull Request

## What

One or two sentences on what this PR changes.

## Why

Why is this change needed? Link the motivating issue, proposal, or discussion.

Closes #

## Scope

- [ ] Docs only (README, RUBRIC, GOVERNANCE, CONTRIBUTING, COC)
- [ ] Backlog addition or edit
- [ ] Issue / PR template change
- [ ] Governance change (requires two-maintainer approval)
- [ ] Other — describe:

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit style in the commit messages
- [ ] Links verified
- [ ] No new secrets, keys, or tokens in the diff
- [ ] If changing RUBRIC or GOVERNANCE, explicitly call out the behavior change in the PR description
